evidence.content: MH580 Sports Polarized Sunglasses

100% UV protection and Category 4 lenses fully block intense sunlight and glare. Polarized lens technology enhances object definition and contrast for safer outdoor enjoyment. Designed specifically for regular hikers, these lightweight sunglasses offer exceptional stability and comfort. [UV Protection] Made with UV-blocking material to shield your eyes from harmful UVA and UVB rays—ensuring safe, comfortable vision in any weather. [Polarized Lenses] Optimized for outdoor activities, these lenses deliver vivid colors and sharp contrast while effectively eliminating glare from water or snow. Note: Polarization may reduce smartphone screen visibility. [Lens Tint Selection by Light Conditions] Per ISO 12312-1 standard: Category 1 — light tints for low-light conditions; Category 2 — medium tints for moderate sunlight; Category 3 — dark tints (82–92% visible light absorption) for bright environments like beaches or mountains; Category 4 — very dark tints (92–97% visible light absorption) for extreme sunlight, e.g., high-altitude mountaineering. [Important Notes] Decathlon lenses are made of impact-resistant but scratch-prone polycarbonate. Scratches do not impair UV protection, as the mirror coating is purely aesthetic. Tint color (gray, brown, etc.) is a matter of preference—protection performance remains identical across all colors. [Warranty Period] 2 years.
